network.title: Network Connection
network.description: Enter the IP address and port of your TCP-to-serial converter connected to the heater's COM1 port.

serial.title: USB Serial Connection
serial.description: Enter the serial device path of the USB-to-RS232 adapter connected to the heater's COM1 port.

access_mode.title: Access Mode
access_mode.description: Choose how the integration interacts with your heater.

read_write_warning.title: Write Mode Warning
read_write_warning.description: Write mode allows changing heater parameters from Home Assistant. Incorrect values could affect heater operation. Only enable if you understand the risks.

sensors.title: Select Sensors
sensors.description: The heater was contacted and reported the sensors below with their current values. Select the sensors you want to monitor.

parameters.title: Select Parameters
parameters.description: The following writable parameters were found on your heater. Select which ones you want to control from Home Assistant. For safety, none are selected by default.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heater or connection lost during sensor reading. Check your connection settings and cables. Detail: {error_detail}
error.no_sensors: Connected successfully but no sensors were found.

init.title: Fröling Heater Options
init.description: Adjust polling interval and sensor selection.
